angel_desc: Too many eyes, too much light, too much intent. Heals, protects, cuts with feathers, and burns with rays.
angel_divine_word_desc: A holy word covers an area with protection.
angel_divine_word_tooltip: Shielded 5 for 2 turn(s), 3% chance in radius 2 (hex within 4). Cooldown: 2.
angel_scorching_ray_desc: A ray of heavenly heat burns the target and the next in line.
angel_scorching_ray_tooltip: Burning: 10 damage for 2 turn(s), 5% chance chaining up to 2 targets (target within 4). Cooldown: 4.
angel_sharp_feathers_desc: Angelic feathers fall like sharp rain.
ball_throw_desc: The bear version of sports: the ball lands first, questions come later.
ball_throw_tooltip: 20 damage, Stunned for 3 turn(s) (target within 4). Cooldown: 1.
bear_ball_throw_desc: The bear version of sports: the ball lands first, questions come later.
bear_ball_throw_tooltip: 20 damage, Stunned for 3 turn(s) (target within 4). Cooldown: 1.
bear_desc: A large forest enemy: throws a ball, heals by sucking its paw, and greets you aggressively.
bear_hallo_desc: A loud greeting that makes the bear noticeably bolder.
bear_paw_suck_desc: A short pause to soothe the paw and get back into the fight.
bee_desc: Small, angry, and not alone. Stings, heals with honey, and calls backup.
bee_honey_cold_desc: Healing honey with a chilling side effect.
bee_honey_cold_tooltip: 18 healing, Slowed for 3 turn(s) (target within 3). Cooldown: 2.
bee_sting_desc: A quick jab with a poisonous aftertaste.
bee_sting_tooltip: 7 damage, Poisoned: 5 damage for 3 turn(s), 2% chance (target within 1). Cooldown: 1.
bee_summon_bee_desc: Calls another bee to help the hive.
berry_throw_desc: The berry looks cute until it hits someone in the face.
burning_bear_burning_claw_desc: The claw leaves a deep burn and bad memories.
burning_bear_burning_claw_tooltip: 55 damage, Burning: 5 damage for 3 turn(s), 7% chance (target within 1). Cooldown: 3.
burning_bear_desc: A boss who decided a normal bear was not enough. Throws tires, burns with claws, and shakes the arena.
burning_bear_hellshake_desc: A hellish shake hits the whole arena.
burning_bear_hellshake_tooltip: 15 damage, Burning: 1 damage for 2 turn(s), 2% chance across the whole arena (any hex). Cooldown: 3.
burning_bear_summon_bear_desc: Calls a bear, because one bear was clearly not enough.
burning_bear_tire_throw_desc: The burning bear hurls a tire across the arena.
burning_bear_tire_throw_tooltip: 30 damage, Burning: 5 damage for 3 turn(s), 7% chance (target within 10). Cooldown: 1.
bush_berry_throw_desc: The berry looks cute until it hits someone in the face.
bush_curse_desc: The bush whispers something awful, and the target's feet betray them.
bush_desc: A suspiciously alive bush. Throws berries, curses targets, and smells far too inviting.
bush_nice_smell_desc: An overly pleasant scent pulls everyone closer to the source.
curse_desc: The bush whispers something awful, and the target's feet betray them.
dialogues_boss_defeat_gloat_text: Не расстраивайся. Проигрывать — это тоже навык. Ты явно его оттачиваешь.
dialogues_boss_intro_early_text: Быстро добрался. Или я слишком близко стоял.
dialogues_boss_intro_text: So you made it this far. I'm almost impressed.
dialogues_boss_player_wins_text: Ладно. Ладно. Не ожидал. Но у меня было плохое утро, так что это не считается.
dialogues_boss_taunt_text: Ты уверен, что готов? Потому что у меня впечатление обратное.
dialogues_boss_tired_text: Знаешь, я устал тебя недооценивать. Попробую переоценить — посмотрим, поможет ли.
dialogues_choice_chain_a_text: Ты выбрал А. Разумно. Или нет — зависит от контекста, которого у меня нет.
dialogues_choice_chain_test_text: Тест цепочки с выбором. Выбери что-нибудь.
dialogues_long_test_line_text: Это длинная реплика специально для теста тайпрайтера и скипа. Буквы едут медленно, ты нажимаешь мышью — и всё появляется сразу. Потом второй клик закрывает. Если ты читаешь это целиком без клика — значит автоаванс работает. Хорошо.
dialogues_merchant_brush_off_text: Понятно. Заходи, если передумаешь. Или если снова умрёшь — тут рядом.
dialogues_merchant_goods_text: Много чего. Часть из этого даже работает. Выбирай, не стесняйся.
dialogues_merchant_greet_text: А, клиент. Живой, судя по всему. Чем могу?
dialogues_merchant_late_run_text: Уже не первый раз заходишь. Уважаю настойчивость. Скидку всё равно не дам.
dialogues_merchant_sold_out_text: Мог бы сказать «всё распродано», но честнее будет — ничего стоящего не завезли.
dialogues_respawn_choice_text: You died. Again. Are you learning anything from this?
dialogues_respawn_existential_text: Ты вообще задумывался, зачем продолжаешь? Нет, серьёзно. Я хочу понять.
dialogues_respawn_rival_jab_text: О, опять ты. Я уже было подумал, что всё кончилось. Ошибся.
dialogues_respawn_third_text: Ладно, я впечатлён. Не успехами — упорством.
dialogues_upgrade_big_choice_text: Хороший выбор. Или плохой. Узнаешь через две волны.
dialogues_wave_first_text: Первая волна. Разминка. Или нет — они уже серьёзно.
fire_slime_desc: A lump of living heat. Spits magma and ignites with a touch.
fire_slime_firey_touch_desc: A close touch that makes everything hotter.
fire_slime_firey_touch_tooltip: 10 damage, Burning: 5 damage for 3 turn(s), 7% chance (target within 1). Cooldown: 1.
fire_slime_magma_spit_desc: A spit of molten magma burns and slows an area.
fire_slime_magma_spit_tooltip: 15 damage, Slowed for 4 turn(s) in radius 1 (hex within 4). Cooldown: 3.
hallo_desc: A loud greeting that makes the bear noticeably bolder.
honey_cold_desc: Healing honey with a chilling side effect.
honey_cold_tooltip: 18 healing, Slowed for 3 turn(s) (target within 3). Cooldown: 2.
lavender_lion_bite_desc: A powerful bite that makes the lion feel better.
lavender_lion_desc: A proud predator with a lavender scent. Roars, bites, and can truly scare enemies.
lavender_lion_roar_desc: A lavender roar inspires allies nearby.
lavender_lion_scare_desc: The lion scares enemies until they forget their plans.
lavender_lion_scare_tooltip: Fear for 2 turn(s) in radius 1 (hex within 3). Cooldown: 3.
manekin_desc: A training target with no emotions and questionable patience.
monkey_business_desc: No strategy, just honest monkey business.
monkey_desc: Fast, loud, and chaotic. Triggers monkey time and jumps into the fight.
monkey_time_desc: Monkey time begins: faster, tougher, louder.
monkey_time_tooltip: Strength 10 for 2 turn(s), 5% chance, Shielded 1 for 2 turn(s), 2% chance. Cooldown: 3.
mushroom_boar_desc: A stubborn boar overgrown with mushrooms. It gores, spreads spores, and weakens targets.
mushroom_boar_spores_desc: A cloud of spores dazes enemies and steals their turn.
mushroom_boar_spores_tooltip: Stunned for 1 turn(s) in radius 1 (hex within 3). Cooldown: 4.
mushroom_boar_tusk_attack_desc: The mushroom boar rams the nearest target with its tusks.
mushroom_boar_weaken_desc: Mold finds weak points and cuts the target's fighting spirit.
mushroom_boar_weaken_tooltip: Weakness 10 for 3 turn(s), 5% chance (target within 4). Cooldown: 2.
nice_smell_desc: An overly pleasant scent pulls everyone closer to the source.
paper_jam_desc: A classic office nightmare: paper jams everything nearby.
paper_jam_tooltip: Rooted for 1 turn(s) in radius 1 (hex within 4). Cooldown: 3.
paw_suck_desc: A short pause to soothe the paw and get back into the fight.
skill_test_combo_multikey_effect_desc: Test ability for checking multiple effects at once.
skill_test_combo_multikey_effect_tooltip: Test: multiple effects on one target.
skill_test_status_fear_desc: Test ability for checking the fear status.
skill_test_status_fear_tooltip: Applies fear in a test scenario.
skill_test_status_multi_desc: Test ability for checking multiple statuses.
skill_test_status_rage_tooltip: Applies rage in a test scenario.
skill_test_status_runtime_desc: Test ability for checking statuses during combat.
skill_test_status_runtime_tooltip: Creates a runtime status for testing.
spores_desc: A cloud of spores dazes enemies and steals their turn.
spores_tooltip: Stunned for 1 turn(s) in radius 1 (hex within 3). Cooldown: 4.
staple_shot_desc: A staple flies straight, hurts, and slows the target.
staple_shot_tooltip: 10 damage, Slowed for 3 turn(s) (target within 3). Cooldown: 1.
stapler_desc: An office predator in close combat. Shoots staples, creates jams, and dives under the desk.
stapler_paper_jam_desc: A classic office nightmare: paper jams everything nearby.
stapler_paper_jam_tooltip: Rooted for 1 turn(s) in radius 1 (hex within 4). Cooldown: 3.
stapler_staple_shot_desc: A staple flies straight, hurts, and slows the target.
stapler_staple_shot_tooltip: 10 damage, Slowed for 3 turn(s) (target within 3). Cooldown: 1.
stapler_under_desk_jump_desc: A sharp jump into the safe zone under the desk.
status_enraged_desc: Deals more damage and acts more aggressively.
status_feared_desc: Frightened and may lose control of actions.
status_glitched_desc: Behaves unpredictably because of a glitch.
sting_desc: A quick jab with a poisonous aftertaste.
sting_tooltip: 7 damage, Poisoned: 5 damage for 3 turn(s), 2% chance (target within 1). Cooldown: 1.
summon_bee_desc: Calls another bee to help the hive.
teapot_desc: An office teapot that understood too much. Vanishes, spills the tea, and gathers everyone for tea.
teapot_low_possibility_desc: The teapot chooses the least likely option: vanishing.
teapot_spill_the_t_desc: It spills not tea, but truth. And a little lava.
teapot_spill_the_t_tooltip: creates a lava pit (hex within 5). Cooldown: 3.
teapot_tea_gathering_desc: Gathers everything around one very hot point.
teapot_tea_gathering_tooltip: pulls targets in radius 2 (hex within 5). Cooldown: 3.
tusk_attack_desc: The mushroom boar rams the nearest target with its tusks.
ui_floor_replace_none: Nothing to replace — no other types
ui_game_editor_exit_unsaved_body: Exit Game Editor and lose unsaved changes?
ui_game_editor_level_row_edit_button_too: Open this level's map in the Map Editor (saves the game first).
ui_game_editor_load_unsaved_body: You have unsaved changes. Load another game and lose them?
ui_game_editor_restore_body:
An autosave from a previous Game Editor session was found.
Restore it?
ui_map_editor_delete_wave_body: Wave contents (%d objects / %d spawners) will be lost.
ui_map_editor_restore_body: Found an unsaved editor session. Restore it?
ui_tool_panel_brush_hint: LMB drag to paint. Size 2 = 7 hexes, size 3 = 19, etc.
ui_tool_panel_rect_hint: Press LMB at corner A, release at corner B. Fills axis-aligned rect.
under_desk_jump_desc: A sharp jump into the safe zone under the desk.
weaken_desc: Mold finds weak points and cuts the target's fighting spirit.
weaken_tooltip: Weakness 10 for 3 turn(s), 5% chance (target within 4). Cooldown: 2.
